hooks.command: $j = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $j.tool_input.file_path; if ($f -and $f -notmatch '\.claude') { Set-Location 'C:\Users\stefm\bestemaaltijdbox\.claude\worktrees\modest-johnson'; git add $f 2>&1 | Out-Null; $name = Split-Path $f -Leaf; git diff --cached --quiet 2>&1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { git commit -m "auto: update $name" 2>&1 | Out-Null; git push 2>&1 | Out-Null } }
